title:
SB 1366 - This act provides that the county treasurer's signature shall be the only signature authorized or permitted on any bank signature card, deposit agreement, or other authorization document for any account maintained in a county depositary for county funds under the treasurer's custody. No other county official or employee shall be authorized or required to be listed as a signer on any such account.
	
	This act is identical to HB 3120 (2026), and is similar to SB 810 (2025).
TRISTAN BENSON, JR.

other_titles.title: Modifies provisions relating to county treasurers
